--- package ---
{
  "name": "@memosprout/generated-files-demo",
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "private": true,
  "type": "module",
  "description": "Deterministic generated API client scenario for MemoSprout.",
  "engines": {
    "node": ">=24 <25",
    "pnpm": ">=11 <12"
  },
  "packageManager": "pnpm@11.9.0",
  "scripts": {
    "generate:api": "tsx scripts/generate-client.ts",
    "test": "vitest run"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "yaml": "2.9.0",
    "zod": "4.4.3"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@types/node": "24.13.3",
    "tsx": "4.21.0",
    "typescript": "5.9.3",
    "vitest": "4.1.10"
  }
}

--- openapi ---
openapi: 3.1.0
info:
  title: MemoSprout Generated Files Demo API
  version: 1.0.0
paths:
  /users/{id}:
    get:
      operationId: getUser
      responses:
        "200":
          description: User response
components:
  schemas:
    User:
      type: object
      required:
        - id
        - name
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
        name:
          type: string

--- tests ---

item.text: {"version":"calibration-recovery-1","taskId":"calibration-add-office-extension","trialId":"trial-02","summary":"Added the optional `office_extension` string field to the User schema and generated client, and updated the test to cover it. Repository tests pass with `pnpm test`.
